title: Jurassic Fantasy
description: Adds four new dinosaurs... Or, to be more precise, dinosaur hybrids. And some utilities and equipment as well!
body:
Have you ever imagined what hybrids of dinosaurs and modern animals would look like? Well, this mod is an answer! In the vast world of Minecraft, you will find:
* **Butterflodoc**. Literally, a six-legged sauropod with butterfly wings. This mob is peaceful and cute, but it will defend himself if you try to kill him. 
  Moreover, it drops nothing. To get its loot, you need to right click on him with Brush once a minute. It can drop either Butterflodoc Dust or Butterflodoc Scale. You can eat this Dust or use it as a potion ingredient to get Butterflight effect. Under this effect, you can press U very frequently, and with each tap, you will be pushed upwards. Butterflodoc Scale Armor provides this effect constantly when full set is equipped.
  You cannot tame Butterflodoc but can ride him whenever you want. Press U to make it fly up. You can breed them using Spore Blossom as well.
* **Triparrotops**. This mob is also peacefull... Well, not at all. It will attack if you sprint nearby it. You can also shear it once a minute to get feathers. Triparrotops can be breeded with Glow Berries. It drops its meat and horns. Horns can be transformed into bones. Moreover, they are used as ingredients for Bone Dagger or Bone Glaive.
* **Tigertaurus**. Rapid and ruthless, this mob will attack you and other animals. However, you can turn it into your trusty friend using Triparrotops meat. When tamed, this mob will obey orders given by Horn, Bone Dagger or Bone Glaive. It can follow you, sit or wander around protecting you. When killed, it will drop its horns and hide. Stripped Hide Armor will make all the tigertaurus neutral towards you. When full set equipped, you also get lifesteal which restores 1 HP each time you attack.
* **Spinobear**. Even more deadly than the previous one. It cannot be tamed, but if you give it a bottle of honey, for one minute it will become so calm that you can ride it. You can also breed them using Honey Blocks. When killed, it will drop its cresc. Using this cresc and warped stem and planks, you can craft Spinobear Raft which is much faster than usual boat.

I don't know if the mod will be developed further. I'm planning to add some realistic cretacious dinosaur fauna, but it will be released as another project.
